base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ending_samus_suitless_reveal — a ui (menu_screen) from 1986 metroid. Ending reveal — Samus removes helmet to show female face. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Ending reveal — Samus removes helmet to show female face; iconic plot-twist-reveal for 1986 gaming. Portrait variant on title/menu/ending sheet
